full_text:
Cao Chong (Cangshu) 曹沖 (倉舒)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Chong (曹沖), styledCangshu (倉舒). One of Cao Cao’s sons. Possessed an adult’s intelligence at age 5, but died young. Cao Chong was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cao Chong lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
